text:
is Zeno's grandfather and an elite professional assassin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 13 He is the oldest living member of the Zoldyck Family.

Appearance

Maha's body has probably deteriorated considerably due to his old age. He stands at (about 4 ft 7 in), ten centimeters shorter than Kalluto.

Personality

Maha's personality is mostly unknown, but he apparently has no deep relationships with any other Zoldyck, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 326 despite this, he stills continues to help the family's business, as seen when he helped Illumi and Kalluto. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 Being an assassin for decades, Maha is very likely cold-blooded and does not hesitate to kill his targets.

Background

 and was trained to be an assassin. At some point of his life, he met and fought Netero, as mentioned by Zeno. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Maha is indirectly mentioned by the bus tour guide when talking about the Zoldyck Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 

Yorknew City arc

Maha helps his great-great-grandsons Kalluto and Illumi assassinate the Ten Dons after being hired by Chrollo. 

Chimera Ant arc

Zeno mentions that Netero is the only person who has fought Maha and lived, adding that the two are around the same age. 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Maha makes a brief cameo appearance during Killua's deduction of all the connections among the Zoldyck Family. Maha appears to have no relationship of any kind with anyone in his family. 

Equipment

Zoldyck Personal Transmitter: The assassins of the Zoldyck Family can contact each other with a special transmitter to report the fulfillment of a murder contract. 

Abilities & Powers

As a member of the Zoldyck Family, Maha has vast wealth and capable underlings at his disposal. His family name alone is enough to scare those familiar with it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 Since he is a Zoldyck assassin, he can also open the Testing Gates, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 although the number of doors he can open is unknown.

Assassination Skills: Maha, being a Zoldyck assassin, is one of the best killers in the world, as seen when he helped Illumi to kill the Ten Dons. Given his age, he must be extremely experienced in the field of assassination.

Nen

Maha is an . According to Zeno, Maha was so powerful in his youth that Netero, once considered the strongest Nen user in the world, is the only person to challenge him and live to tell the tale. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

In the official databook, his name is also spelled as "Mahha Zaoldyeck". 
His name is not given in the manga or anime adaptations, only mentioned in the official databook. 
In Coco Loo's explanation and according to the 2004 databook, Maha is Zeno's father. However, in Chapter 264, it seems as though Yoshihiro Togashi retconned him to be Zeno's grandfather. His age may have been changed as well since the family tree lists him as being the same age as Isaac Netero. 
It is also possible that Maha and Zigg Zoldyck are the same person and that his name was retconned along with his age and his relations to the rest of the family.
Mahá (मह in Devanagari) means “great” or “big”, among other meanings, in the ancient Sanskrit language of northern India.

Anime and Manga Differences

Maha does not appear during the Yorknew City arc in the 2011 anime adaptation.
In the 1999 anime adaptation of the Greed Island arc, Maha appeared in a non-speaking cameo. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 73 (1999)
